chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1538 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 6080/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 6081/2025 4. For orders on M.A. 6082/2025 5. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Wajid Ali Khaskheli, Advocate for Petitioner. ----- 1. Granted. 2to5. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that an appeal filed by the Petitioner is pending before Respondent No.4 Vice-Chancellor, Liaquat University of Medical & Health Sciences Jamshoro and he would be satisfied and would not press present Petition if the directions are issued for its Decision as early as possible. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of along with pending applications with direction to the Respondent No.4 to decide the Petitioner’s pending appeal (available at page 99 of the file) by giving patient hearing to the Petitioner and pass an speaking Order in accordance with law within two months. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
